CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed as to remaining cross complaints pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Determining Good Faith Of Settlement And Pos
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew Lenhardt, Esq., from Coddington Hicks & Danforth, for Defendant and moving party Jackeline Rossal (incorrectly sued as Rosales)
Francis J. Shehadeh, Esq., Law Offices, 415-771-6174, for plaintiff and non opposing party
Karen Vander Meer, Esq., from Gilbert, Kelly, Crowley & Jennett LLP, 415-352-6410, for Defendants and opposing party: David Kim and Kang Chong

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling:
DEFENDANT JACKELINE ROSSAL'S Notice Of Motion For Order Determining Good Faith Of Settlement is Granted. A policy limits settlement is reasonable, in good faith and in accordance with Tech-Bilt due to Ms. Rossal's financial circumstances.
Clarification made about the correct name of the defendant, to be ROSSAL instead of ROSALES. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Francis J. Shehadeh, Esq., Law Offices, 415-771-6174, for plaintiff and moving party

Karen Vander Meer, Esq., from Gilbert, Kelly, Crowley & Jennett LLP, 415-352-6410, for Defendants and opposing party: David Kim and Kang Chong

Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF BOBBY HAYNES' Notice Of Joinder To Defendant's Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement. Off calendar in light of the ruling on the underlying motion. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
